caption: The video features a healthcare professional, likely a doctor or nurse, dressed in pink scrubs and wearing a green patterned surgical cap, glasses, and a blue face mask. The individual is seated and appears to be engaged in an educational or instructional session, possibly part of a simulation week as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo in the bottom right corner. The person is gesturing with their hands while speaking, suggesting they are explaining or demonstrating something important. The setting seems to be a classroom or training environment, with a plain wall and a framed picture in the background. The text "Day 4" and an icon of a person with a cane on the left side of the screen suggest that this is part of a multi-day program, potentially focusing on patient care scenarios involving elderly individuals.
